items.title: Trump and Dimon Are Talking Again After Yearslong Rift
items.description: America’s most powerful banker and the president have met twice in the past two months to talk about the economy, interest rates and trade.

items.title: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Partners With Coinbase To Integrate Banking And Crypto Services
items.description: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) has recently announced a strategic partnership with Coinbase, signaling a move towards integrating traditional banking with the digital asset economy. These strategic maneuvers, along with the reported increase in customer choice through enhanced bank-to-wallet connections, may have contributed to the company's 21% price rise over the last quarter. During this period, JPMorgan also increased its dividend and expanded its share buyback program, aligning with broader market...

items.title: JPMorgan, Coinbase Agree to Link Bank, Crypto Accounts
items.description: JPMorgan Chase and Coinbase Global signed an agreement to directly link customers' bank accounts to their cryptocurrency wallets. Paige Smith reports on "Bloomberg Markets."
